archetype.name: Sentinel
archetype.note: This archetype offers Mighty Bulwark at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Stalwart Defender
archetype.note: This archetype offers Mighty Bulwark at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Mighty Bulwark
feat.text: Thanks to the incredible connection you have forged with your armor, you can use it to shrug off an extensive array of dangers. Your bonus from the bulwark armor trait increases from +3 to +4, and it applies on all Reflex saves, not just damaging Reflex saves.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.

sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
